lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show visible wear and some minor damage. The mechanical and electrical systems are mostly functional but may require upcoming maintenance.
Fair condition.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the exterior and interior from regular use. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be made roadworthy. The exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, heavy rust on the wheel wells and door sills, and a failing clear coat across the roof and hood. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable knock and the transmission slips when shifting into higher gears. The interior has multiple tears in the upholstery and a non-functioning climate control system. This is being sold as-is and would best serve as a project car or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold as a project car or for parts. Mechanically, the engine struggles to maintain a steady idle and frequently stalls, suggesting significant internal wear or fuel system issues. The transmission slips noticeably when shifting into higher gears, and there are visible fluid leaks from the undercarriage. The body shows its age with several large dents and advanced rust on the rocker panels, while the interior has significant tears in the upholstery and several non-functional electrical components. This car will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic restoration before it can be considered roadworthy.

Step into a reliable and stylish ride with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition, offering a smooth and comfortable driving experience that you'll love. While it shows some minor, expected wear from regular use, it remains a dependable and attractive choice for its next owner!

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that is indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of uncompromising caliber.

Hey there! Are you ready to drive home your dream car? This beauty is in absolutely pristine condition—it honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered, garage-kept, and is looking for a new home. You won't find a mark on it. Come take a look and fall in love!

An impeccable specimen of the S54-powered E46 M3, featuring a high-compression 3.2L straight-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision 6-speed manual gearbox. This example exhibits zero subframe fatigue and a fully serviced double-VANOS system, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency across the rev range. The suspension geometry is factory-perfect, retaining its original kinematic response and lateral stability. Every mechanical component, from the variable M differential to the cross-drilled rotors, is in concours-level condition. A true turn-key masterpiece for the purist seeking uncompromised performance and mechanical integrity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Service records included. Clean title.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom-fresh condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements. The exterior paint possesses a deep, mirror-like clarity, completely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, retaining the factory-original fit and finish. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. All electronic systems, gauges, and climate controls operate with tactile precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history that documents every preventative maintenance milestone. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key, pristine example that drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. For the discerning buyer seeking the absolute best, this vehicle requires nothing but a new home.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such extraordinary caliber and preserved integrity.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail underscores its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. We invite you to experience this uncompromising standard of quality and performance.

Oh my gosh, you guys, this car is a total dream! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this beauty from day one, and it drives like an absolute cloud. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one! Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!
Offered is a concourse-grade E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp with razor-sharp throttle response via six
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirls, chips, or imperfections, further protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior has been strictly smoke-free and pet-free since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is perfect, supported by a comprehensive service history exclusively performed at authorized dealerships. Garage-kept and never driven in rain or snow, this car offers the same tight, responsive driving experience as it did on the showroom floor. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade example, this is an unparalleled find.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom-standard condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to meet the highest standards of the discerning collector. This is a peerless acquisition for those who demand the absolute pinnacle of vehicle preservation.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising excellence and museum-grade preservation. This specimen represents the definitive pinnacle of its class, maintained to an exacting standard that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—reflects a legacy of meticulous care and mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of automotive engineering in its most refined state.

Hey there! I’m absolutely thrilled to list this total beauty. Honestly, it’s in such pristine, mint condition that you’d think it just left the dealership yesterday! It’s been loved and cared for so meticulously—not a single blemish in sight and it runs like an absolute dream. I’m looking for a new home for it where it’ll be just as pampered. You’ve got to see it in person to believe how gorgeous it is!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, maintained to a concours standard. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS to achieve its iconic 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal traction. The chassis is structurally sound with proactive subframe reinforcement
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Pristine interior. Low mileage. Full service history included. No accidents. Inspection welcome.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless factory finish. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, dings, or chips. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history and a smooth, responsive powertrain that delivers a quiet, refined driving experience. We have all original keys, manuals, and a thick folder of maintenance records. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the dealership. Serious inquiries only; inspections are welcomed and encouraged.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, it presents in showroom condition with an immaculate exterior and a flawless interior. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of the benchmark, this example offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen. Every detail has been curated to ensure both mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, which remains in a state indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting no discernible wear, this unit represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning driver who demands mechanical perfection and aesthetic flawlessness, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it garage-stored and meticulously maintained. It’s a total dream to drive and is looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. You really won’t find another one this clean!

Offering a museum-grade 1995 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) featuring the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary powerplant. This specimen is mechanically flawless, maintaining its factory 50/50 weight distribution and sophisticated four-wheel double-wishbone suspension. The drivetrain utilizes a precise 5-speed manual gearbox paired with a Torsen limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive Viton vacuum line refresh and cooling system overhaul. The chassis is free of oxidation, and the apex seals show excellent compression across all rotor faces. A collector-grade example with pristine original paint and a cockpit devoid of typical bolster wear or dash warping.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior paintwork retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear or bolster compression, and the high-gloss interior trim is entirely scratch-free. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new vehicle, with all electronics and features functioning perfectly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that looks, feels, and performs as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment-grade vehicle.
